title: Technical Co-founder vs. Software Agency: The Hidden Cost of Overhead
pain_point: Paying for account managers, project managers, and 'sales calls' instead of actual senior engineering hours.
verdict: If you need a team to manage your project because you don't have time, hire an agency. If you need a working product that makes money, hire a technical co-founder.

title: Senior Product Engineering vs. The 'Junior Dev Lottery'
pain_point: The 'Relay Race' of hiring cheap developers who deliver technical liabilities that break under real customer load.
verdict: Cheap code is the most expensive thing a startup can buy. Don't win the lottery; invest in an asset.

title: Custom Engineering vs. No-Code Platforms
pain_point: Starting fast but hitting a 'performance wall' or 'vendor lock-in' just as your business starts to scale.
verdict: No-code is great for validation. Senior engineering is required for a business that scales.
